title: Minimum Deletions for At Most K Distinct Characters
description:
You are given a string s consisting of lowercase English letters, and an integer k.
Your task is to delete some (possibly none) of the characters in the string so that the number of distinct characters in the resulting string is at most k.
Return the minimum number of deletions required to achieve this.

Example 2:

Constraints:
constraints: s consists only of lowercase English letters.
hints: Compute the frequency of each character in s and collect these into a list counts.
Let d = (number of distinct characters) – k. If d <= 0, return 0.
Otherwise, the minimum deletions is the sum of the first d entries in counts (removing the d least-frequent characters).
